use_cases: Hero section animated background for creative/tech websites
Interactive loading screen with warp-speed visual effect
Landing page with dynamic tunnel animation responding to cursor movement
Standalone visual effect component for immersive user experiences
ai_summary: A WebGL-based warp drive shader component using Three.js that renders an interactive light-speed tunnel effect. The animation creates a hypnotic RGB color tunnel with smooth gradients, responding dynamically to mouse position for parallax-like interaction. Perfect as a standalone visual effect or hero background for media, creative, and tech-focused applications.
